apiWebsite
Table of Contents

Class NewsSearchRequest

Namespace
BackEndProject.Models
Assembly
BackEndProject.dll

Class NewsSearchRequest is used to collect all the query parameters. This class acts as a model for the request parameters instead of writing all query variables as parameters in the endpoint.

public class NewsSearchRequest

Query

Variables describe the query parameters. The query parameters are used to filter the news articles. The query parameters are optional.

[FromQuery(Name = "query")]
public string? Query { get; set; }
